name: Lenoir's Transportation-Chrtr
fleet_size_est: ~95 vehicles (8 yellow school buses, 30 minivans, 23 passenger vans, 55-pass charter buses per company About page)
employees_est: 5 drivers per FMCSA SAFER; staff likely 10-20 total
districts_or_customers: Bloomingdale/Passaic County NJ area; student transportation plus charter/event work
recent_news: FMCSA Satisfactory safety rating as of Feb 2025; family-owned, established 2011 as LLC after 1998 founding of sister Lenoir's Transportation Inc.
fit_notes: Small family-owned NJ operator with only ~8 yellow school buses; mostly charter/limo mix. Sub-scale for Summit tuck-in; school bus component too small to move the needle in NJ.

name: L G Bus Line Inc
fleet_size_est: very small (single-tier per source data; ~2 employees suggests micro-fleet)
service_types: special needs (per Elgie Bus Lines website)
districts_or_customers: Hialeah/Miami-Dade County FL area; private school transportation and charter trips
recent_news: No M&A or notable news found; operates under Elgie Bus Lines brand at elgiebuslines.com offering home-to-school, special needs, and charter services
fit_notes: Micro-operator in Hialeah/Miami-Dade with only ~2 employees. Far too small for a meaningful Summit tuck-in; would only be relevant as a Florida market entry roll-up component.

name: Absolute Limousine LLC
fleet_size_est: small (sedans, SUVs, limousines, party/mini buses; ~6 employees)
districts_or_customers: Stamford, Danbury, Norwalk, Westport, Darien, Fairfield CT and NYC metro; corporate and event clients (no confirmed school district contracts)
recent_news: None material found; positions as luxury ground transportation provider in Fairfield County over 10+ years
fit_notes: NOT a school-bus operator. Luxury limousine/black-car service; no evidence of SPED or yellow-bus school contracts despite source-data 'special_needs' flag. Out of scope for Summit tuck-in.

name: Advantage Medical Trnsprtn
districts_or_customers: Atlanta metro: Gwinnett, Fulton, DeKalb, Newton, Rockdale, Walton Counties; hospitals, nursing homes, dialysis centers (no school district contracts)
recent_news: None material; 20+ year track record in metro Atlanta NEMT; explicitly states 'we are not an ambulance service'
fit_notes: NOT a school-bus or SPED operator. Pure adult NEMT (wheelchair/stretcher). Out of scope for Summit student-transportation tuck-in strategy.

name: Icare Transportation SVC LLC
fleet_size_est: very small (wheelchair-accessible vans; ~8 employees per source)
districts_or_customers: Lowcountry SC (Bluffton/Beaufort County area); adult day centers, medical appointments, behavioral health clients (no school district contracts identified)
recent_news: Founded 2022; certified by SC Public Service Commission and Office of Regulatory Staff; veteran-owned (USMC)
fit_notes: NOT a school-bus or SPED contractor. Adult NEMT focused on disabled/elderly riders; only 3 years old and ~8 staff. Out of scope for Summit student-transportation tuck-in.
